response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music found, matching Reference JSON. Audio consists of bilingual speech (English/Japanese). 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON used for scene boundaries and speaker identification. Manual transcription and translation performed for all dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps anchored strictly to vocal starts. Subtitles split logically to handle code-switching and maintain semantic flow. Visual text prioritized during transitions.

subtitles.original: Haa! Oh my god!
I celebrated... uh...
I celebrated my birthday with
a lot of friends too this year!
subtitles.english: a lot of friends too this year!

subtitles.original: Yeah! A lot of the girls came
subtitles.english: Yeah! A lot of the girls came

subtitles.original: to celebrate my birthday...
...and also Detective Anya
managed to solve that mission!
Wow, she's got it! Detective Anya!
subtitles.english: Wow, she's got it! Detective Anya!

subtitles.original: Did you guys like Detective Anya as well?
subtitles.english: Did you guys like Detective Anya as well?

subtitles.original: Detective Anya was pretty cool,
but not as cool as me!
subtitles.english: but not as cool as me!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! And also...
special guests! There were special guests!
subtitles.english: special guests! There were special guests!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I can't believe I got to
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I can't believe I got to

subtitles.original: sing with Hatsune Miku!
Hatsune Miku-chan!
Oh my god, she was really cute!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, she was really cute!

subtitles.original: And also for the narration for my story part,
subtitles.english: And also for the narration for my story part,

subtitles.original: Ueda Reina-san narrated!
Oh my god! Ueda Reina-san also...
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Ueda Reina-san also...

subtitles.original: narrated the story part too!
上田麗奈さんもね、
ストーリーパートのナレーションもね、
上田麗奈さんがやってくれました！
subtitles.english: Ueda Reina-san did it for me!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
ミクちゃんとも歌ったし、
いや盛りだくさんでしたね、今年。
subtitles.english: it was really packed this year.

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Lots of wild things happening
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Lots of wild things happening

subtitles.original: on this year's birthday live!
How did you guys like it?
subtitles.english: How did you guys like it?

subtitles.original: How did you guys like it? Oh my gosh!
subtitles.english: How did you guys like it? Oh my gosh!

subtitles.original: Yeah! I had a lot of fun!
subtitles.english: Yeah! I had a lot of fun!

subtitles.original: But... I would like to make
subtitles.english: But... I would like to make

subtitles.original: an announcement this year!
It's the usual.
ここで告知があります！
I have an announcement to make!
subtitles.english: I have an announcement to make!

subtitles.original: Let me make an announcement!
はい！こちら！
Oh my god! What is that? Who is that?
subtitles.english: Oh my god! What is that? Who is that?

subtitles.original: Is that me? Yes, it is!
subtitles.english: Is that me? Yes, it is!

subtitles.original: We're releasing some new
merchandises too this year!
What do we have?
Let's take a look at them, shall we?
subtitles.english: Let's take a look at them, shall we?

subtitles.original: そして、えっと、一つずつ見ていきましょう。
subtitles.english: And, let's look at them one by one.

subtitles.original: まずはこちらです！
Woo! It's a canvas art!
Study Time with Anya! The canvas art!
subtitles.english: Study Time with Anya! The canvas art!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, this illustration is so cute!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, this illustration is so cute!

subtitles.original: It's illustrated by Lunar-sensei!
Lunar先生にイラストを
書いていただきました！かわいい！
The theme is, you know, literary girl!
subtitles.english: The theme is, you know, literary girl!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, so smart! So intelligent!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, so smart! So intelligent!

subtitles.original: 文系少女という
テーマになっております！
次はこちら！
Study Time with Anya! The notebook!
subtitles.english: Study Time with Anya! The notebook!

subtitles.original: This is, I think this is my first notebook!
subtitles.english: This is, I think this is my first notebook!

subtitles.original: I've never had a notebook
as a merchandise before!
Oh my goodness! Please use this
subtitles.english: Oh my goodness! Please use this

subtitles.original: lots for all your notes, for anything!
subtitles.english: lots for all your notes, for anything!

subtitles.original: 色々メモしてね、
オリジナルノートです！出ます！
subtitles.english: it's an original notebook! It's coming out!

subtitles.original: と、次はこちら！
Oh! It's a pen case!
How cute is that? ペンポーチです！
subtitles.english: How cute is that? It's a pen pouch!

subtitles.original: ペンポーチも初かな？ノートも初らしいし、

subtitles.english: and the pen pouch is also a first!

subtitles.original: ぜひ一緒にね、あのノートと使ってください！
subtitles.english: Please use it together with that notebook!

subtitles.original: Use this along with the notebook!
subtitles.english: Use this along with the notebook!

subtitles.original: I think they would go
really well together, okay?
次は、こちら！
今年もボイスが出ます！
subtitles.english: A voice pack is coming out this year too!

台本を書かせていただいております！
I wrote the script as usual,
subtitles.english: I wrote the script as usual,

subtitles.original: as usual for every year!
I wrote the script for this situational voice,
subtitles.english: I wrote the script for this situational voice,

subtitles.original: so please get it! Please get it!
subtitles.english: so please get it! Please get it!

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, the voice will be in Japanese
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, the voice will be in Japanese

subtitles.original: but there will be scripts in Bahasa Indonesia,
subtitles.english: but there will be scripts in Bahasa Indonesia,

subtitles.original: English, and Japanese.
ちなみにボイス自体は日本語になりますけど、
subtitles.english: By the way, the voice itself is in Japanese,

インドネシア語と英語と日本語の台本があります！

subtitles.original: ぜひ聴いてください！
そしてフルセット購入特典はこちら！

subtitles.english: what is that? A hand-signed autograph?

subtitles.original: Oh my god, it's the first for me!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, it's the first for me!

初、初ですね、アーニャが自らサインをして、

この機会でゲットしてください！

subtitles.english: And for the standard edition, it includes
